description: An agent must analyze open-ended feedback from an employee satisfaction survey to identify key themes.

nodes.task_description: Load the survey data, focusing on the column with open-ended text comments.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully loads the text data.

nodes.task_description: Perform topic modeling on the text comments to identify the main topics of discussion.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies topics like 'Work-Life Balance', 'Compensation', and 'Management'.

nodes.task_description: Generate a summary report of the key topics and include an illustrative anonymous quote for each.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a report that effectively summarizes the qualitative feedback.
